1744930.name: Touching Grass Simulator
1744930.description:
Have you touched grass today?
In Touching Grass Simulator, embark on the ultimate quest to reclaim nature, one blade of grass at a time. This quirky and satisfying incremental game lets you grow, manage, and nurture a sprawling field of grass, transforming a barren plot into a lush paradise.

Whether you're planting seeds, upgrading your tools, or automating the process, there's always something to do. Perfect for fans of relaxing, incremental games—or anyone who could use a virtual break from the chaos of daily life.

Will you master the art of grass cultivation and become the ultimate Grass Tycoon? Or will you simply enjoy the chill vibes of watching grass grow?

Key Features

  • Grow Grass, Literally: Plant seeds, watch grass grow, and keep expanding your green empire.

  • Incremental Gameplay: Start small and progress into managing an endless field of grass with upgrades, tools, and automation.

  • Relax and Unwind: Enjoy a calming and therapeutic gameplay experience with satisfying visuals and sound effects.

  • Upgrade and Automate: Unlock advanced tools, sprinklers, and other upgrades to maximize your growth potential.

  • Humor and Charm: Packed with tongue-in-cheek humor and nods to the "Touch Grass" meme.

  • Dynamic Progression: From a single blade of grass to a sprawling, self-sustaining lawn—it's all up to you!

Why Play Touching Grass Simulator?

  • Need a break? Touch grass—virtually!

  • Love incremental games? You’ll enjoy the steady flow of upgrades and satisfying growth loops.

  • Searching for something funny, yet relaxing? This game offers a perfect mix of humor and chill gameplay.

Get ready to touch grass in the most satisfying way possible.
Touching Grass Simulator—it’s more fun than it has any right to be! 🌱
1744930.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
